field.selfCheck:
I hereby declare that the information furnished herein is true and correct to the best of my knowledge.
I understand that if any part of the information is found to be false or incorrect at a later stage, I shall be liable for legal action, including cancellation of my registration as a beneficiary, and recovery of any amount disbursed to me or my family members under any scheme of the Andhra Pradesh Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Vijayawada, along with applicable interest and penalties as determined by the Board.
